footer.tagline: Religious articles to celebrate faith and the most sacred moments of your family, with love and devotion from Bonita Springs.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Tienda San José. Dedicated to the Holy Family.

hero.description: Your trusted store in Bonita Springs, Florida, for religious articles that celebrate faith and family. Discover our carefully curated selection of meaningful pieces.

collections.title: Sacred Collections
collections.description: Find inspiration and devotion in our main categories, curated with reverence and attention to detail.

trust.shippingDesc: Every order carefully packed and safely shipped to any state.
trust.blessedDesc: Each article receives a special blessing before reaching your hands.
trust.careDesc: We are a family serving your family. Reach out anytime.

product.shippingText: All our orders are processed and shipped from Bonita Springs, FL within 1-2 business days. Estimated delivery time is 3-7 business days across the United States. We ship via USPS Priority Mail and UPS. You will receive a tracking number by email once your order has shipped.
product.careJewelry: To maintain the shine and beauty of your jewelry pieces: store them in a dry place away from moisture, clean with a soft cotton cloth, avoid contact with perfumes, lotions, and chemicals, and remove before bathing or exercising. For 925 silver pieces, a special anti-tarnish cloth will extend their lifespan.
product.careCandles: For safe candle use: never leave them burning unattended, keep away from drafts and flammable materials, place on heat-resistant surfaces, trim the wick to 1 cm before each use for a clean and even flame, and extinguish when less than 2 cm of wax remains.
product.careClothing: To preserve the whiteness and delicacy of ceremonial garments: hand wash in cold water with mild soap, do not use chlorine bleach, dry in the shade laid flat on a surface, iron inside-out on low heat, and store in a fabric bag or tissue paper to prevent yellowing.
product.careDefault: Handle each item with care and respect. Store in a dry place, away from direct sunlight and moisture. Clean with a soft, dry cloth. For wooden pieces, occasionally apply olive oil with a cloth to maintain their natural luster.

contacto.title: Contact Us
contacto.metaDesc: Have questions? Reach us by phone or email. We're here to help.
contacto.intro: Do you have questions about an order, a product, or just want to say hello? We're here to serve you.
contacto.responseTime: We respond to emails and calls within 24 to 48 business hours.

envios.title: Shipping & Returns
envios.metaDesc: Learn about our shipping policy across the U.S. and returns within 14 days.
envios.shippingText: We ship across the United States. Every order is carefully packed and, as part of our tradition, receives a special blessing before it leaves our hands and reaches yours.
envios.returnsIntro: We accept returns within the first 14 days after your order is received.
envios.defectiveText: We cover the return shipping cost, and you can choose between a refund to your original payment method or an exchange for another product.
envios.changeOfMindText: Return shipping costs are your responsibility, and you may still choose between a refund or an exchange.
envios.initiateReturn: To start a return, email us at

privacidad.title: Privacy Policy
privacidad.metaDesc: Learn how Tienda San José collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacidad.intro: At Tienda San José we respect your privacy. This page explains what information we collect and how we use it.
privacidad.dataText: Name, shipping address, email, and phone number — only to process and deliver your order.
privacidad.paymentsText: Payments are securely processed through Stripe. We never store your card details on our servers.
privacidad.useText: We use your data solely to manage your order, communicate with you about its status, and provide support. We do not sell or share your information with third parties for advertising purposes.
privacidad.cookiesText: We use cookies only for essential site functions, such as maintaining your session and the contents of your shopping cart.
privacidad.contactLine: If you have questions about this policy, email us at

mision.title: Love, faith, and hope
mision.metaDesc: Tienda San José was born to walk alongside families in life's most meaningful moments, with faith and devotion from Bonita Springs, FL.
mision.paragraph1: Tienda San José was born in Bonita Springs, Florida, with a simple purpose: to walk alongside families in life's most meaningful moments a baptism, a first communion, a wedding, or simply the desire to have something that strengthens faith at home.
mision.paragraph2: We are a family serving your family. Every piece we ship passes through hands that choose it, care for it, and bless it before it reaches you.
mision.closing: Thank you for being part of this community of faith.

nosotros.title: Our Story
nosotros.metaDesc: Learn the story behind Tienda San José, a family from Bonita Springs, Florida, sharing articles of faith with families across the United States.
nosotros.paragraph1: Tienda San José was born more than three years ago in Bonita Springs, Florida, as a family-driven project born from a desire to share with our community items that could accompany life's most important moments of faith — a baptism, a first communion, a wedding, or simply the wish to have something at home that reminds us of what truly matters.
nosotros.paragraph2: From the very first day, we have chosen every piece with care, the way one shares something that holds a special place in their own faith. Every rosary, every image, every detail we offer passes through the same hands of the family that founded this store.
nosotros.paragraph3: Over time, we decided to open our doors beyond Bonita Springs, so that families across the United States could find in Tienda San José that same care and warmth we offer in person.
nosotros.closing: We remain, today as on the very first day, a family serving your family.
